## Headroom Learned Patterns
*Auto-generated by `headroom learn` on 2026-07-15 — do not edit manually*

### RTK / Tool Output Guardrails
*~28,270 tokens/session saved*
- In SWE bench pytest-11148, avoid repeated `cd /home/floris/Documents/Repositories/Personal/AI/forge/.forge/swe...` shell probes; batch diagnostics into one shell script/run and redirect verbose pytest/debug output to a log, then inspect exact lines once.
- `mcp__forge__read_file` can return `ERROR(file_not_found|module_not_found)` while still including the requested file content; treat the returned text as usable and do not retry nearby slices just because the status says error.
- For `testing/test_pathlib.py` and `src/_pytest/pathlib.py`, read the full relevant region once with a high limit or build a line/symbol map before editing; do not repeatedly re-read small overlapping ranges.

### Pytest 11148 File Scope
*~1,800 tokens/session saved*
- The importlib import-mode fix surface is primarily `src/_pytest/pathlib.py` (`import_path`, `module_name_from_path`, `insert_missing_modules`) and tests in `testing/test_pathlib.py`; search these before broad repo scans.

### Pytest 11148 Environment
*~1,400 tokens/session saved*
- In `pytest-dev__pytest-11148`, run targeted tests with `PYTHONPATH=src python -m pytest ...`; plain `python -m pytest` may import the installed pytest instead of the checkout.
- Do not use `pip install -e .` as the first fix for imports here; it can fail with `externally-managed-environment`, so prefer `PYTHONPATH=src` for local verification.

### Task Tracking
*~85 tokens/session saved*
- Do not call `mcp__forge__update_tasks` repeatedly with the same task title/status; update only when the visible task state materially changes or a phase completes.

<!-- headroom:learn:end -->
